1: Punish those stealing from the state
Enforce strict rules by checking the records and punishing anyone who steals from the state.
2: Show your military power and demand that the rebels surrender to your authority immediately.
3: Consider who holds power in the empire
Remove all other rivals to the throne to ensure you are the only ruler of the empire.
4: Declare that you rule by divine right and bring all government power under your personal control.
5: Secure trade routes to grow your territory
Take control of neighboring lands and secure trade routes to make the empire larger.
6: Set up a system of secret agents to watch everyone and stop threats before they start.
7: Consider a strong move against a stubborn kingdom
Choose a full military invasion to force the defiant kingdom of Kalinga to join your empire.
8: Consider using big animals and all your stuff for a strong attack
Use elephants and resources for a big strike
Use all available resources and war elephants to launch a massive attack on Kalinga.
9: Consider a bold move for victory
Initiate a decisive attack on the city
Order a final, direct assault on the city to win the war quickly, no matter the cost.
10: Reflect on the impact of violence
Acknowledge the harm done, take responsibility
Face the reality of the violence and admit that you feel deep regret for the lives lost.
11: Stop all future wars and focus on healing your conscience instead of winning more glory.
12: Follow the path of non-violence and accept the peaceful teachings of the monk.
13: Pass new laws that ban animal sacrifice and protect the lives of all living creatures.
14: Make a public statement declaring your personal faith in the Buddha and his teachings.
15: Create a group of officials whose main job is to help the poor and ensure people are treated fairly.
16: Invest in healthcare and green spaces
Use the empire's wealth to build hospitals, dig wells, and plant trees for the public good.
17: Carve messages of kindness and moral behavior on rocks and pillars for everyone to see.
18: Organize a major religious meeting to settle arguments and keep the faith unified.
19: Send envoys to share and learn
Send peaceful messengers to foreign kings to share knowledge, medicine, and moral values.
20: Explore ways to share kindness globally
Send your kids abroad for peace missions
Send your children on a mission to other countries to spread the message of peace and kindness.
21: Consider the values of truth and mercy
Implement rules for honesty and kindness
Set a final moral code for the people that emphasizes truth, mercy, and self-control.
